response.overview: Pratama (17), a vocational school student who once won a painting competition, now works as a bamboo laborer to care for his sick father. After being expelled from school because he could not afford the fees, he kept all his memories and hopes. One day, he found a poster for a new painting competition. Torn between the realities of life and his longing for the world of art, Pratama tries to pick up his brushes again. However, the decision is not easy, as there is an unresolved past.
response.tagline: A piece of bamboo, a piece of hope that does not want to break.
response.title: A Blade
